asOfDate.description: The date as of which the interests information was requested. This field will default to the date when the interest information was retrieved (i.e., today's date).

interests.description: The interests for the specified issuer.

nextPageToken.description:
Submit the `nextPageToken` string as `pageToken` in a subsequent request to retrieve the next page.

If the response omits `nextPageToken`, then there are no subsequent pages.

schema_def.description: The response from the List Interests endpoint.
